mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate held near the zero lower bound signals persistent monetary accommodation, lowering the equity discount rate and supporting risk asset valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20d returns falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or periods of near-zero rates show negative average forward returns with p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE crosses above 10% within a short window, it signals an acute labor-market shock that depresses consumer income expectations and corporate earnings forecasts, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets price in recessionary risk.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE snapshot value 14.7 exceeds crisis threshold
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day forward returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE > 10%, or the effect is not statistically distinguishable from baseline (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Joint deceleration where PAYEMS month-over-month growth turns negative while INDPRO simultaneously contracts indicates a synchronized labor-and-production downturn, a stronger recessionary signal than either series alone, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC of the joint PAYEMS+INDPRO contraction signal versus 60-day forward returns is not more negative than either single-series signal's IC, or is below 0.03 in absolute value over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary easing cycle (FEDFUNDS near zero), a rebound in HOUST above its trailing 6-month average signals that low rates are successfully stimulating housing demand, a leading indicator of broader economic recovery, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises above trailing 6-month average while FEDFUNDS < 1%
failure_condition: In periods satisfying the trigger, average 60-day forward SPX return is not significantly positive (p > 0.10), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained acceleration in CPIAUCSL year-over-year growth above 4% triggers expectations of monetary tightening, raising discount rates and compressing equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward SPX returns following CPIAUCSL YoY > 4% readings are positive in more than 55% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 across rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A steady positive month-over-month trend in RSAFS reflects resilient consumer spending, which sustains corporate revenue growth expectations and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between RSAFS MoM growth and forward 20-day SPX returns falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO growth decouples negatively from GDPC1 growth (industrial output falling while aggregate real output still reported positive due to reporting lag), the divergence anticipates a downward GDP revision and forward earnings disappointment, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO QoQ negative while GDPC1 QoQ positive
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with weakening industrial base
failure_condition: 60-day forward SPX returns following this divergence are not significantly negative (p > 0.10) relative to unconditional baseline, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: In a regime where FEDFUNDS is pinned near zero and UNRATE remains extremely elevated (>10%), monetary policy has limited additional room to stimulate the economy, so further UNRATE deterioration signals persistent structural damage rather than a cyclical dip, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:snapshot shows FEDFUNDS=0.05 and UNRATE=14.7 concurrently
regime_hint: zero-lower-bound liquidity trap with labor market crisis
failure_condition: SPX forward 20-day returns are positive in more than 55% of periods satisfying the joint trigger, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.
